violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Handwashing sink near pizza oven was found without soap. Handwashing sinks should be supplied with soap at all times.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Handwashing sink near pizza oven was found without paper towels. Handwashing sinks should be supplied with paper towels or other approved means for drying hands at all times.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
